turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Reporting a Lost Item or Filing a Minor Police Report

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Good morning, can you help me please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Good morning! Of course, I'm here to help. Could you let me know what item you’ve lost and where you think you might have lost it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I lost my wallet, I think, but I'm not sure where it is, near the Opera House bar.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I see, thank you for sharing that. Could you describe the wallet for me? For example, its color, brand, or any distinguishing features?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “It's a small wallet with green and red color.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, a small

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “and with a gucci part, gucci, let's say, wait, pattern”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, a small wallet with green and red colors and a Gucci pattern. That definitely helps. Could you also let me know approximately when you last had it or when you think you lost it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think I lost it this morning because I went to have a breakfast in... to had a breakfast near the Opera House and”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that’s helpful.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “After 2 hours I noticed that there isn't, but maybe it's near the park, because we also sit for 1 hour in the park.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I see, that makes sense. So it could be near either the breakfast spot or the park. Could you let me know if there are any important items inside the wallet, like cards or IDs, that we should be aware of?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, this is a big problem because I lost also my ID card and my driver's license, also the money inside it.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I understand, that definitely makes it more urgent. Thank you for sharing that. Just to confirm, do you remember the exact time you were at the breakfast place and the park, so we can narrow down the search?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I ate breakfast”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries, take your time. Whenever

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I ate breakfast at half past eight, I think, and I went to the park at ten.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that helps a lot. Thank you for that detail. I’ll make a note of those times. Is there any other information or any contact details you’d like us to have, so we can reach you if we find it?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can you repeat, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! I was asking if there’s any other information or contact details you’d like to provide, so we can reach you if we find your wallet.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh yes, can I give you my email?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That sounds perfect. Whenever you’re ready, just let me know your email, and we’ll make sure to keep you updated.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “The email is abc123.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, thank you so much. We’ll definitely keep you posted if we find anything. Is there anything else I can assist you with at the moment?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can you repeat, please, the email?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! The email you provided is abc123. If you need to add any more details, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, it also like is a ABC 1 2 3 Kiotula gmail.com”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, that’s noted down. Thank you! If there’s anything else you think of or any other way I can help, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you have idea how I have to wait? For how long I have to wait?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s a great question. Typically, it can take a couple of days to check and verify, but we’ll definitely keep you updated as soon as we have any news. If we find it sooner, we’ll let you know right away.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can you repeat, please?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course! Usually, it can take a couple of days to verify and check, but we’ll keep you updated as soon as we have any news. And if we find it sooner, we’ll let you know right away.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, it's perfect. Thank you so much for the support. I hope you find it, and if not can I ask you to help me for all the things I need to receive again my ID card?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, I’m happy to help! And of course, if we don’t find it, I can guide you through the process of replacing your ID card and any other items. Just let me know whenever you need that assistance.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “No, thank you. Thank you so much for the support. Have a nice day.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! It was my pleasure to help. If you need anything else, just let me know. Have a great day!
